name: component-variants
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML component variant matrix: a grid of one named component rendered in several structural variants, each cell labeling its state, the prop combo that produces it, and a usage note. Live controls from the reference are dropped (static gallery).

slots.description: Matrix title; used in <title> and the h1.
Name of the component whose variants are shown, e.g. '<Card />'.
Variant cells; each renders a state label, prop combo, a rendered specimen, and a usage note.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.variants[]: { state: string, props: string, note: string }
